info.name: HELPDESK.AI Backend API
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman collection for the HELPDESK.AI Backend — an AI-driven IT support ticket triage, classification, and auto-resolution service.

## Authentication
Supabase service-role authentication is performed server-side. Frontend clients should call these endpoints over HTTPS from the configured CORS origins.

## Rate Limits
- `/ai/analyze_ticket`: 10 requests/minute/IP
- Other AI endpoints: standard rate limiting applies

## Base URL
- Local: `http://localhost:8000`
- Staging: `https://staging-api.helpdesk.ai`
- Production: `https://api.helpdesk.ai`

variable.description: API base URL — switch between local, staging, and production
Replace with an actual ticket ID from your database
Replace with an actual company/tenant ID

item.name: System
item.description: Service health, readiness, landing page, and monitoring endpoints.

request.description: Returns an interactive HTML landing page with links to Swagger UI, ReDoc, health check, and API documentation.

Returns a lightweight status payload showing whether core models (classifier, NER, embeddings) are loaded and the service is operational.

**Response:**
- `status`: "healthy" | "degraded"
- `models_loaded`: boolean
- `uptime_seconds`: number

Kubernetes-compatible readiness probe. Returns `ready` only when all required subsystems (classifier, NER, Supabase connection) are initialized.

**Response:**
- `ready`: boolean
- `checks`: object with per-subsystem status

Reports Redis connectivity, hit/miss ratios, and cache configuration. Useful for debugging cache-related performance issues.

**Response:**
- `redis_connected`: boolean
- `hit_rate`: float
- `keys_count`: number

Returns WebSocket connection pool statistics for monitoring real-time ticket update subscriptions.

**Response:**
- `active_connections`: number
- `total_messages_sent`: number

Prometheus scrape endpoint — exposes HTTP request durations, AI inference latency, ticket processing counts, and system resource metrics. Requires a valid metrics token.

**Auth:** Bearer token via `METRICS_TOKEN` env var.

item.name: AI Analysis
item.description: Core NLP endpoints: ticket classification, troubleshooting, bug analysis, duplicate detection, and streaming analysis.

request.description:
Main entry point for end-to-end ticket triage. Runs the full AI pipeline:
1. OCR (if image attached)
2. NER extraction
3. Category classification
4. Priority estimation
5. Duplicate detection
6. RAG knowledge base lookup
7. SLA breach calculation

**Rate Limit:** 10 requests/minute/IP

**Request Body:**
- `title` (required): Ticket title
- `description` (required): Full ticket description
- `company_id` (optional): Tenant scoping

**Response:** TicketResponse with classification, priority, SLA estimate, similar tickets, and suggested resolution.

Lightweight AI analysis without full ticket lifecycle. Returns classification and priority without creating a ticket record or running duplicate detection.

**Use case:** Quick triage preview before submitting a full ticket.

Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming version of the AI analysis. Returns partial results as each pipeline stage completes, enabling real-time progress updates in the UI.

**Response:** `text/event-stream` with JSON chunks for each stage.

Dynamic multi-step troubleshooting wizard powered by Gemini. Each call returns the next diagnostic question or suggested fix based on the user's previous answers.

**Request Body:**
- `ticket_id`: Associated ticket
- `step`: Current step number (1-based)
- `user_response`: User's answer to the previous step

**Response:** TroubleshootResponse with next question, suggested actions, and `should_end` flag.

Analyzes a structured bug report (title, description, repro steps, environment) and returns severity assessment, root cause hypothesis, and suggested investigation areas.

**Response:** BugReportAnalysisResponse with severity, category, root cause analysis, and recommended next steps.
Returns AI model performance metrics: classification accuracy, average response time, error rate, and feedback scores. Used for monitoring model quality over time.

Log an admin correction when the AI prediction differs from the human decision. These corrections are used for continuous model improvement and retraining.

**Auth:** Requires authenticated user with admin role.
Checks if a ticket description matches any existing open tickets using cosine similarity on sentence embeddings. Returns similarity scores and matching ticket IDs.

Triggers a background reindex of all ticket embeddings for the given company. Use after bulk ticket imports or when duplicate detection quality degrades.

**Auth:** Admin role required.
V2 analysis endpoint with improved classification model and enhanced duplicate detection. Returns the same TicketResponse format as v1 but with higher accuracy.

item.name: Tickets
item.description: CRUD operations over support tickets (Supabase-backed). Includes search, bulk operations, ratings, and SLA tracking.

query.description: Filter by status: open, closed, pending, escalated

request.description:
List tickets with optional filtering by company, status, priority, and date range. Supports pagination via limit/offset.

**Auth:** Requires authenticated user.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "New monitor flickering",
  "description": "The new Dell monitor I received keeps flickering every few minutes. Tried different cables.",
  "company_id": "{{companyId}}",
  "priority": "medium",
  "category": "Hardware"
}

request.description:
Create a new support ticket. Runs the AI classification pipeline automatically if classification fields are not provided.

**Request Body:**
- `title` (required): Ticket title
- `description` (required): Full description
- `company_id` (required): Tenant ID
- `priority` (optional): low, medium, high, critical
- `category` (optional): Override AI classification

**Auth:** Requires authenticated user.

Save a ticket as draft without triggering AI analysis. Useful for agents who want to create tickets incrementally.

**Auth:** Requires authenticated user.
Retrieve a single ticket by ID. Returns full ticket details including AI classification, SLA status, and audit trail.

Partially update a ticket. Only provided fields are modified. Automatically logs changes to the audit trail.

**Auth:** Requires authenticated user.

query.description: Search query (full-text search on title and description)

request.description: Full-text search across ticket titles and descriptions. Returns relevance-ranked results.

Returns the estimated SLA breach time for a ticket based on its priority level and creation time.

**Response:**
- `sla_breach_at`: ISO timestamp
- `time_remaining`: human-readable duration
- `priority`: effective priority level
Returns a company-scoped chronological audit trail for a ticket. Shows all status changes, assignments, priority updates, and AI corrections.

Update multiple tickets in a single request. Useful for batch operations like closing resolved tickets or reassigning.

**Auth:** Admin or master role required.

Delete multiple tickets permanently. Requires admin or master role. Returns count of deleted tickets and any failed IDs.

**Auth:** Admin or master role required.

Submit a 1-5 star satisfaction rating for a resolved ticket. Ratings are aggregated for CSAT reporting.

**Auth:** Requires authenticated user.

Retrieve the satisfaction rating for a specific ticket.

**Response:**
- `rating`: 1-5
- `feedback`: optional text
- `rated_at`: ISO timestamp

item.name: SLA Management
item.description: SLA tracking, breach detection, escalation management, and policy configuration.

request.description:
Returns aggregate SLA statistics: total tickets, breach count, average resolution time, and compliance percentage.

**Response:** SLAStatsResponse with breakdown by priority level.
List tickets filtered by SLA status. Useful for dashboards showing at-risk and breached tickets.
Get detailed SLA information for a specific ticket including breach timeline, escalation history, and time remaining.
List recent SLA escalations. Shows which tickets were auto-escalated due to approaching or breaching SLA deadlines.
List all configured SLA policies with their priority mappings, response times, and resolution targets.
Manually trigger an SLA compliance check for a specific ticket. Normally runs automatically via the scheduler.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Internal endpoints for CSAT reporting, knowledge gap analysis, auto-resolve settings, and security auditing.

request.description:
Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) report. Returns aggregated ratings, NPS score, and trend data.

**Auth:** Admin role required.

Identifies topics where the AI has low confidence or frequent corrections. Useful for prioritizing knowledge base content creation.

**Auth:** Admin role required.

Returns the current auto-resolve configuration: enabled status, confidence threshold, excluded categories, and max auto-resolves per day.

**Auth:** Admin role required.

Returns the security audit log: authentication attempts, permission changes, data access events, and anomaly detections.

**Auth:** Admin role required.
Retrieve global system settings: AI model configuration, rate limits, feature flags, and integration endpoints.

Update global system settings. Only provided fields are modified.

**Auth:** Admin role required.

item.name: Translation
item.description: Multi-language translation endpoints for tickets and text. Powered by the language pipeline service.

request.description:
Translate arbitrary text to the target language.

**Request Body:**
- `text` (required): Source text
- `target_language` (required): ISO 639-1 code (e.g., 'es', 'fr', 'de', 'ja')

**Response:**
- `translated_text`: Translated string
- `source_language`: Detected source language
- `confidence`: Detection confidence
Translate an entire ticket (title + description + comments) to the target language. Preserves formatting and technical terms.

Detect the language of the input text.

**Response:**
- `language`: ISO 639-1 code
- `confidence`: 0.0-1.0
- `alternatives`: Other possible languages with scores
List all supported translation languages with their ISO codes and display names.

item.name: Estimator
item.description: Response time and SLA estimation endpoints.

request.description:
Estimate expected response and resolution times based on priority, category, and historical data.

**Response:**
- `estimated_response_time`: ISO duration
- `estimated_resolution_time`: ISO duration
- `confidence`: Estimation confidence based on historical data volume

List configured SLA target times by priority level.

**Response:** Map of priority → {response_time, resolution_time}

Transcribe an audio file to text using speech-to-text.

**Request:** Multipart form with audio file
**Response:**
- `transcript`: Transcribed text
- `language`: Detected language
- `duration`: Audio duration in seconds

formdata.description: Audio file with the ticket description

request.description:
One-step voice-to-ticket: transcribes audio, extracts ticket details, and creates a ticket with AI classification.

**Request:** Multipart form with audio file and company_id
**Response:** Created ticket object
Check voice transcription service health and model availability.

item.name: Weekly Digest
item.description: Automated weekly digest emails with ticket summaries and trends.

request.description: Preview the weekly digest content for a company without sending the email. Returns ticket stats, trends, and highlights.

Manually trigger the weekly digest email for the authenticated user's company.

**Auth:** Requires authenticated user.

item.name: Legacy Endpoints
item.description: Original v0 endpoints preserved for backward compatibility. Prefer the /ai/ equivalents for new integrations.

request.description: Legacy analysis endpoint. Use `/ai/analyze_ticket` instead for new integrations.
Legacy OCR analysis endpoint. Extracts text from images and analyzes alongside the ticket text.
Legacy similar ticket lookup. Use `/ai/check_duplicate` instead.
Legacy Gemini-powered resolution suggestion. Use `/ai/troubleshoot` for the interactive wizard experience.
